name: mail-calendar-mcp
description: MCP server for full Apple Mail and Apple Calendar control via JXA

scripts.build: tsc && mkdir -p dist/jxa/scripts && cp src/jxa/scripts/*.js dist/jxa/scripts/ && npm run build:helper
scripts.build:helper: mkdir -p bin && swiftc -swift-version 5 -O helper/main.swift -o bin/calendar-helper -Xlinker -sectcreate -Xlinker __TEXT -Xlinker __info_plist -Xlinker helper/Info.plist && codesign --force --sign - --identifier com.mathewcsims.mail-calendar-mcp.calendar-helper bin/calendar-helper
